diagrams.title: Cost of Change Curve (Waterfall vs Agile)
diagrams.description: Shows exponential increase in change costs across project phases for Waterfall, and flatter curve for Agile
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why early defect detection and Agile methods reduce change costs

diagrams.title: Cone of Uncertainty
diagrams.description: Illustrates how estimation accuracy improves as project progresses from concept to completion
diagrams.purpose: Understand why Agile's adaptive planning is essential and estimates improve over time

diagrams.title: Agile Feedback Loop
diagrams.description: Shows the iterative cycle of planning, executing, reviewing, and adapting in Agile projects
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how continuous feedback enables low-cost changes in Agile

diagrams.title: Iterative vs Sequential Development
diagrams.description: Compares Waterfall's sequential phases with Agile's overlapping iterative cycles
elements: Waterfall: Requirements → Design → Implement → Test → Deploy (sequential)
Agile: Iteration 1, 2, 3... each with all phases overlapping
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate how iterations enable earlier feedback and lower change costs

visuals.title: Agility And The Cost Of Change
visuals.description: Visual diagram for agility and the cost of change
